name: MP4 Basic FullHD
desc:
FullHD stereo MP4, -18dB LUFS aac
Good quality, optimal size
cmd: ffmpeg -hwaccel videotoolbox -i {input} -c:v h264_videotoolbox -crf 24 -preset medium -maxrate 5M -vf scale=-1:1080 -r 30 -pix_fmt yuv420p -profile:v high -bufsize 10M -level 4.0 -c:a aac -b:a 192k -ar 48000 -ac 2 -af loudnorm=I=-18:TP=-1.5:LRA=11 -movflags +faststart {output}.mp4
